---
title: "Hello!"
---


::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
I'm Moaaz. I am currently a Mathematics PhD candidate at the University of Oregon, expecting to graduate in 2027.
I am fortunate to be working under the supervision of [Victor Ostrik](https://pages.uoregon.edu/vostrik/).
Before that, I completed my bachelors degree in mathematics with minors in physics and computer science at the American University in Cairo.

Here is my [CV](cv.pdf){target="_blank"} - last updated: March, 2026



### Contact Information


**email:** [malqady@uoregon.edu](mailto:malqady@uoregon.edu)

**Office:** Fenton Hall 314-D, University of Oregon

**Office Hours:** Mondays & Fridays 1-2 pm
:::


::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
![](me.png)
:::
